originalTitle: The oil shock meets the Fed ‘curse’: What Kevin Warsh means for your portfolio
summary: Market downturns typically tag new central-bank leaders. And Warsh faces a tough choice between crushing demand or saving the bull market.
content: Market downturns typically tag new central-bank leaders. And Warsh faces a tough choice between crushing demand or saving the bull market.
chineseTitle: 石油危机遭遇美联储“诅咒”：凯文·沃什对你的投资组合意味着什么
chineseSummary: 市场低迷通常会导致新任央行领导人上任。沃什面临着压制需求和拯救牛市之间的艰难选择。
chineseContent: 市场低迷通常会导致新任央行领导人上任。沃什面临着压制需求和拯救牛市之间的艰难选择。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
